name: Helix Genomics
description: Precision oncology platform using whole-genome sequencing to match patients with targeted therapies. 14 active pharma partnerships and presence in 42 oncology centers across 12 states.

name: CarbonPath
description: Soil carbon measurement and verification platform for agricultural carbon credits. Uses hyperspectral imaging and ML models to provide MRV (measurement, reporting, verification) at 10x lower cost than manual sampling.

name: NovaPay
description: Real-time B2B payments infrastructure for mid-market companies. Proprietary fraud detection ML reduces chargebacks by 85%. Processing $2.1B annualized TPV with 72% gross margins.

name: MedLens AI
description: AI-powered diagnostic imaging platform for radiology. Foundation model trained on 12M anonymized scans detects 47 conditions with radiologist-level accuracy. Deployed at 8 health systems.

name: GridShift Energy
description: Virtual power plant platform aggregating distributed energy resources (solar, storage, EVs) for grid services. 340 MW under management across 12 utility partners. Revenue run rate $45M.

name: LedgerBase
description: Embedded accounting API for vertical SaaS platforms. Automates GL entries, reconciliation, and financial reporting. 22 platform partners in beta with $180K MRR.

name: VitalSign Dx
description: FDA-cleared continuous biosensor wearable platform for remote patient monitoring. 3 cleared indications (cardiac arrhythmia, sleep apnea, glucose trending). 18 granted patents. $28M ARR.

name: AeroCarbon
description: Next-generation direct air capture (DAC) using novel electrochemical sorbents. Lab results show 65% energy reduction vs. incumbent approaches. Pilot plant under construction in Iceland.
